---
title: "Research"
listing:
  - id: articles
    contents: "articles/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../assets/templates/research/listing.ejs
    categories: true
  - id: working-papers
    contents: "working-papers/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../assets/templates/research/listing.ejs
    categories: true
  - id: posters
    contents: "posters/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../assets/templates/research/listing.ejs
    categories: true
page-layout: full
toc-location: right
---

My research focuses on the environmental and social determinants of cancer, using causal inference and evidence triangulation to strengthen causal conclusions from observational data.

## Journal articles

:::{#articles}
:::

## Working papers

:::{#working-papers}
:::

## Conference posters

:::{#posters}
:::

## Research software

- [`forrest`](https://github.com/lorenzoFabbri/forrest): R package to create publication-ready forest plots (epidemiology, meta-analysis).
- [`negatr`](https://github.com/etverse/negatr): R package for negative control analysis — detecting and correcting unmeasured confounding in epidemiological studies.
- [`orcidtr`](https://github.com/lorenzoFabbri/orcidtr): R package to retrieve data from the ORCID public API. Available on [CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=orcidtr).
- [`manuscripts`](https://github.com/lorenzoFabbri/manuscripts): Template for writing scientific manuscripts using Markdown and Zotero.

---

*For the most up-to-date list of publications, please see my [Google Scholar profile](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=QbPv1H0AAAAJ&hl=en).*
